issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and inaccurate. Missing: (1) 'look at 5 cards' mechanic (searchFromTop parameter), (2) filter for {Amazon Lily} OR {Kuja Pirates} types, (3) exclusion of [Gloriosa (Grandma Nyon)], (4) 'up to 1' quantity limit, (5) ordering mechanic for remaining cards to bottom of deck
Missing secondary action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. This requires a separate action or extended SearchDeck with reordering capability

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Amazon Lily} or {Kuja Pirates} type card other than [Gloriosa (Grandma Nyon)] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
